case_title: PAMELA SNYDER VS. SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNYDER, PAMELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC. KENMORE USA $3,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,815.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS AGAINST JACK TROUNG, EDWARD LAMPERT, AND LUIS D'AMBROSIA ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT A CLERICAL ERROR IN THE JUDGMENT IS "GRANTED". *(THE NAME OF DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCH AND COMPANY IS CORRECTED TO READ, "SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY")*. - PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL-
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNYDER, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-02-2012, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT KENMORE USA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-04-2012 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-23-2012 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-14-2012 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,550.00 FILED BY SNYDER, PAMELA AS TO DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC. KENMORE USA TROUNG, JACK ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-04-2012 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCK AND COMPANY ELECTROLUX HOME PRODUCTS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-14-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-14-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT SEARS, ROEBUCH AND CO. WAS REPRESENTED BY EDWARD RIOS. DEFENDANT ELECTROLUX HOME WAS REPRESENTED BY CARL KING. DEFENDANTS EDWARD LAMPERT AND LOUIS D'AMBROSIA ARE NOT NAMED IN THE PLAINTIFFS CLAIM, PARTIES ADDED IN ORDER TO FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE.PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
